mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL ( BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_STATUS, BOARD_TYPE, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, 0, 3, 0, SYSDATE, NULL )

SELECT STORE_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TBL ( MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{marketNo}, #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, #{productPrice}, #{productThumb}, #{productStatus}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, #{tradeType} )
mapper.select: SELECT MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY MARKET_NO DESC

SELECT MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND IS_DELETED = 0
